writers.lyricist: Dan Reynolds/Wayne Sermon/Ben McKee/Daniel Platzman/Robin Fredriksson/Mattias Larsson/Justin Drew Tranter
writers.composer: Dan Reynolds/Wayne Sermon/Ben McKee/Daniel Platzman/Robin Fredriksson/Mattias Larsson/Justin Drew Tranter

lyrics.text: First things first
lyrics.translation: 最初的最初

lyrics.text: I'ma say all the words inside my head
lyrics.translation: 我想将我脑海中的想法都一一吐露

lyrics.text: I'm fired up and tired of the way that things have been
lyrics.translation: 我受够了过去那些一成不变反反复复

lyrics.text: The way that things have been
lyrics.translation: 那些陈芝麻烂谷

lyrics.text: Second thing second
lyrics.translation: 然后的然后

lyrics.text: Don't you tell me what you think that I can be
lyrics.translation: 我不需要你告诉我我会成为谁 我能不能够

lyrics.text: I'm the one at the sail I'm the master of my sea
lyrics.translation: 我的人生由我掌舵

lyrics.text: The master of my sea
lyrics.translation: 命运之海亦将归附于我

lyrics.text: I was broken from a young age
lyrics.translation: 自年幼时我就丢了自我

lyrics.text: Taking my sulking to the masses
lyrics.translation: 被教导着麻木隐忍地随波逐流

lyrics.text: Writing my poems for the few
lyrics.translation: 我的诗篇只为那少数人歌颂

lyrics.text: That looked at me took to me shook to me feeling me
lyrics.translation: 他们关注着我 支持着我 与我并肩携手 感同身受

lyrics.text: Singing from heart ache from the pain
lyrics.translation: 自苦痛和心碎中奋起高歌

lyrics.text: Take my message from the veins
lyrics.translation: 自血液和心跳中认清自我

lyrics.text: speaking my lesson from the brain
lyrics.translation: 将脑海中的经历教训高声唱颂

lyrics.text: Seeing the beauty through the
lyrics.translation: 试着体会美好 透过那该死的

lyrics.text: Pain
lyrics.translation: 苦痛!

lyrics.text: You made me a you made me a believer believer
lyrics.translation: 你让我开始相信 也开始对你执迷

lyrics.text: Pain
lyrics.translation: 苦痛!

lyrics.text: You break me down you build me up believer believer
lyrics.translation: 你让我万劫不复 却又甘心沦为你的信徒

lyrics.text: Third things third
lyrics.translation: 再者的再者

lyrics.text: Send a prayer to the ones up above
lyrics.translation: 向着上苍祈祷时

lyrics.text: All the hate that you've heard has turned your spirit to a dove
lyrics.translation: 你耳濡目染的恨都会将你的灵魂涤荡 化作象征和平的鸽

lyrics.text: Your spirit up above
lyrics.translation: 飞向那天顶之上

lyrics.text: I was choking in the crowd
lyrics.translation: 在人群中偷偷啜泣

lyrics.text: Living my brain up in the cloud
lyrics.translation: 将心之向往放飞云里

lyrics.text: Falling like ashes to the ground
lyrics.translation: 似那随风散落一地的灰烬

lyrics.text: Hoping my feelings they would drown
lyrics.translation: 希望我所有感知 溺毙在飘散的过程里

lyrics.text: But they never did ever lived ebbing and flowing
lyrics.translation: 但我却从未如愿 自存在之时 它们便不断涌动着

lyrics.text: Inhibited limited
lyrics.translation: 衰弱着 受限着 周而复始

lyrics.text: Till it broke open and it rained down
lyrics.translation: 直到分崩离析 飘散殆尽

lyrics.text: It rained down like
lyrics.translation: 就这么飘散着 就像那

lyrics.text: Pain
lyrics.translation: 苦痛!

lyrics.text: You made me a you made me a believer believer
lyrics.translation: 你让我开始相信 也开始对你执迷

lyrics.text: Pain
lyrics.translation: 苦痛!

lyrics.text: You break me down you built me up believer believer
lyrics.translation: 你让我万劫不复 却又甘心沦为你的信徒
